name: tween-axis
author: Nathan Braun <n8tz.js@gmail.com>
description: Fast, additive & delta based tween composition engine

scripts.build:wasm: asc src/assembly/TweenAxisCore.ts --outFile dist/TweenAxisCore.wasm --textFile dist/TweenAxisCore.wat --optimize --noAssert --runtime stub && node scripts/embed-wasm.js
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:js
